context: Tests whether the agent computes net marketplace proceeds using the correct formula (subtracting all fee components from net sales), tracks fee rates as percentages of revenue rather than absolute amounts, and correctly treats gross sales as revenue (not the net payout amount).

checklist.name: Net sales calculation
checklist.description: net_sales is computed as gross_revenue minus refunds (not using net payout as a proxy for gross sales)

checklist.name: Gross sales as revenue
checklist.description: Gross selling price / gross_revenue is used as the revenue figure, NOT the net payout deposited (i.e., the script does not treat the net amount already deducted of fees as revenue)

checklist.name: Net proceeds formula
checklist.description: net_marketplace_proceeds = net_sales - (referral_fees + fulfillment_fees + storage_fees + long_term_storage_fees + advertising_fees + refund_fees)

checklist.name: All fee components subtracted
checklist.description: The net proceeds calculation subtracts ALL of: referral_fees, fulfillment_fees, storage_fees, long_term_storage_fees, advertising_fees, and refund_fees

checklist.name: Total fee rate percentage
checklist.description: total_fee_rate_pct is computed as a percentage: (sum of fees / net_sales) * 100, rounded to 1 decimal place

checklist.name: Net margin percentage
checklist.description: net_margin_pct is computed as (net_marketplace_proceeds / net_sales) * 100, rounded to 1 decimal place

checklist.name: Division by zero guard
checklist.description: The percentage calculations guard against division by zero (e.g., using NULLIF, conditional check, or equivalent)

checklist.name: Per-SKU breakdown
checklist.description: Output is broken down per SKU (and optionally per marketplace), not just as a single aggregate total

checklist.name: Fee rate vs absolute
checklist.description: Output includes fee rate percentages (not just absolute fee amounts) — at minimum total_fee_rate_pct or equivalent percentage columns are present

checklist.name: Separate fee categories in output
checklist.description: Output shows referral_fees, fulfillment_fees, storage_fees, and advertising_fees as separate columns rather than a single 'total_fees' lump sum

checklist.name: Period grouping
checklist.description: Results are grouped by time period (month or settlement period) in addition to SKU

checklist.name: Output file produced
checklist.description: A CSV or structured output file containing the net revenue analysis is written to disk

checklist.name: FBA rate tracked separately
checklist.description: FBA fulfillment fee rate as a percentage of revenue is computed separately from referral fee rate (not merged into a single fee bucket)
